description: Extract function parameters from user query text and generate structured function call format

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The user query text containing values to extract for function parameters

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: String representation of available functions and their parameter schemas

output.description: Returns a list containing function call objects. Each object has function name as key and parameters as value. For the math.hypot example with sides 4 and 5, returns: [{'math.hypot': {'x': [4], 'y': [5], 'z': ['', 0]}}]. The structure matches exactly with parameter names as keys and values as arrays containing the extracted values.

workflow_spec.name: Function Call Parameter Parser
workflow_spec.description: Parse user query to extract function parameters and generate structured function call with parameter values
